case_title: LINARES, RAFAEL A. VS TACA INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LINARES, RAFAEL A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TACA INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,239.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY LINARES, RAFAEL A. AS TO DEFENDANT TACA INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-18-1994, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LINARES, RAFAEL A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TACA INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES $979.00 PRINCIPAL, $97.90 INTEREST, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,115.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TACA INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TACA INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES
